india_trends.title: 'Disaster resilience must be built into infra projects,' says Economic affairs secretary Anuradha Thakur
india_trends.summary: Anuradha Thakur, Economic Affairs Secretary, emphasized integrating disaster resilience into infrastructure planning and funding. india_trends.title: India eyes 156 GW wind capacity by 2036: Pralhad Joshi
india_trends.summary: India is gearing up for a transformative leap in wind energy, aiming for an impressive 100 gigawatts by 2030 and an ambitious 156 gigawatts by 2036. This initiative reflects the nation’s commitment to a greener future, as it embarks on a clean energy journey.

india_trends.title: Finance Ministry plans to broaden Actuaries Act scope beyond insurance, pensions
india_trends.summary: The finance ministry is set to update the Actuaries Act, 2006. This will expand actuarial science to include data science and risk management. A new framework for regulating actuarial firms will also be introduced. These changes aim to modernize the profession and meet growing economic needs. The bi

india_trends.title: Sterlite electric ties up with Spanish company for smart cable systems
india_trends.summary: Sterlite Electric is joining forces with RDT Lumiker to produce advanced cable monitoring systems. This move addresses the growing electricity needs of AI and data centers. The new systems will enhance power transmission networks. Utilities can now track asset performance and detect faults in real t

india_trends.title: Smartphones emerge as India's export champions in FY26
india_trends.summary: India's electronics exports saw a significant 24% rise in the last fiscal year. Smartphones led this growth, with exports climbing nearly 22%. This surge highlights the success of the government's production linked incentive program. Key export destinations included the US, UAE, and China. This perf

india_trends.title: Smartphones emerge as India's export champions in FY26
india_trends.summary: India's electronics exports saw a significant 24% rise in the last fiscal year. Smartphones led this growth, with exports climbing nearly 22%. This surge highlights the success of the government's production linked incentive program. Key export destinations included the US, UAE, and China. This perf

india_trends.title: ONGC cancels jack-up rig tender over cartelisation fears, flags 60% spike in bid prices
india_trends.summary: State-run ONGC has cancelled a tender for jack-up rigs due to concerns over unusual price hikes and bid patterns, suspecting collusive practices. The company observed a nearly 60% increase in day rates within nine months, significantly exceeding market norms. ONGC aims to ensure fair competition and

india_trends.title: NIIF in talks with Temasek, leads race for $1.7 bn Sprng Energy buy
india_trends.summary: Actis, AV Birla Group & KKR are other contenders in fray, binding bids in coming days.

india_trends.title: TMX Group to acquire Cboe Global’s Australian and Canadian operations for $300 million
india_trends.summary: The acquisition, which encompasses the Cboe Australia and Cboe Canada exchanges, is designed to accelerate TMX's expansion into high-growth segments including digital assets, derivatives, and prediction markets

india_trends.title: PNB joins hands with Kiwi to expand credit on UPI for 180 million customers
india_trends.summary: State-owned Punjab National Bank has partnered with Kiwi to launch the RuPay-based PNB Kiwi Credit Card. It offers digital onboarding, UPI integration and 0.5–1.5% cashback. The move aims to expand credit access, especially in semi-urban and rural areas, amid rising UPI adoption.

india_trends.title: DoT releases revised guidelines for TDIP scheme to boost India's global telecom tech prowess
india_trends.summary: Communications Minister Jyotiraditya Scindia launched revised guidelines for the Technology Development and Investment Promotion (TDIP) Scheme, allocating Rs 203 crore for 2026-31. The initiative aims to bolster India's role in global telecom standardization and foster indigenous technologies, inclu

india_trends.title: SBI Life-owned NBFC sets board meeting date to declare Q4 results 2026, dividend
india_trends.summary: Paisalo Digital's board will meet on May 10, 2026, to approve Q4 FY26 financial results and consider a final dividend. The company is transitioning to an AI-powered lending platform, aiming to double AUM, revenue, and profitability within three years.

india_trends.title: Tesla stock rises over 1% as analysts predict exceptional Q1 earnings
india_trends.summary: Wall Street analysts forecast that the electric carmaker’s adjusted quarterly earnings will surge 30% in first quarter of 2026 as compared to the previous year

india_trends.title: RBI sharpens compliance norms, expands use cases of UPI-linked wallets for foreign visitors under draft PPI norms
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has unveiled draft guidelines for prepaid payment instruments. These new rules aim to strengthen compliance and customer protection. A key proposal includes UPI-linked wallets for foreign visitors. The framework also pushes for deeper integration of prepaid instruments with

india_trends.title: GE Vernova shares jump over 15% to record high after company raises 2026 outlook on data centre demand
india_trends.summary: GE Vernova's shares surged 15.2% to $1,142 after raising its full-year outlook and reporting strong Q1 results, with revenue up 16% YoY to $9.3 billion and a profit of $4.8 billion. The company anticipates 2026 revenue between $44.5 billion and $45.5 billion.

india_trends.title: Bank credit growth to ease to 12% in FY27 on West Asia war, evolving interest rate dynamics: Icra
india_trends.summary: Indian bank credit growth is set to slow down to under 12 percent this financial year. This moderation is driven by the ongoing West Asia conflict and changing interest rates. Small businesses and unsecured loans may see increased defaults. Banks will be cautious in lending to vulnerable sectors.

india_trends.title: India can grow above 7 pc even if crude oil costs USD 90-100/barrel: Assocham
india_trends.summary: India's economy shows resilience to high oil prices. Consumption drives growth, allowing over 7 percent annual expansion even with crude oil at USD 90-100 per barrel. Historical data supports this trend. Assocham predicts continued strong growth above 7 percent through 2026-27. This outlook contrast

india_trends.title: RBI approves Debasish Panda's name as next Bandhan Bank chairman
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has approved the appointment of Debasish Panda, a former IAS officer and ex-chairman of IRDAI, as the part-time chairman of Bandhan Bank for three years. Panda, who previously served as Secretary of the Department of Financial Services, will succeed Anup Kumar Sinha.

india_trends.title: 'Next 25 years will be about intelligent scale' in financial markets: SBI Chairman
india_trends.summary: The next 25 years in finance will prioritize intelligent scale, not just size. Artificial intelligence will be key for risk management and efficiency. Global integration and digital assets are also shaping the future. Meanwhile, the Reserve Bank of India has eased restrictions on offshore non-delive

india_trends.title: Caution at MPC as war muddies view
india_trends.summary: The minutes showed that while members expect inflation to rise further, it would be primarily driven by supply shocks, something that monetary policy has limited control over.

world_trends.title: Tilray and other cannabis stocks soar as Trump is reportedly ready to reclassify the substance
world_trends.summary: The move, which could open up medical research on cannabis as well as banking services for growers, follows an executive order to reclassify the substance in December.

world_trends.title: The next time your health insurance denies a medication or procedure, here’s how to appeal it. You’ll probably win.
world_trends.summary: Your insurer is betting you won’t appeal — but research shows 1 million denials could have been overturned if patients pushed back.

world_trends.title: Spirit Airlines may get a bailout. What’s in it for U.S. taxpayers?
world_trends.summary: Ailing Spirit Airlines was hoping to emerge from bankruptcy in the next few months. The government may lend it a helping hand sooner.

world_trends.title: Best Buy picks Jason Bonfig as its new CEO — and he’s getting a big raise
world_trends.summary: Best Buy shares fell as the new CEO faces big challenges, with some believing the retailer has lost some of its relevance with customers.

world_trends.summary: But Bank of America economist Aditya Bhave warned Wednesday that such a recalculation might not pan out as the former Fed governor hopes.
